title: Zesty Lime Fizz
instructions: Add vodka, lime juice and sugar syrup to a shaker with ice.
Shake vigorously for 10 seconds.
Strain into a chilled glass and serve.

title: Garden Tonic
instructions: Combine gin, lemon and sugar syrup in a shaker with ice.
Shake briefly and strain into a highball over fresh ice.
Top with tonic water and garnish with a lemon twist.

title: Tropical Coco Crush
instructions: Add all ingredients to a shaker with ice.
Shake until chilled.
Strain into a chilled glass and garnish with pineapple.

title: Salted Margarita Twist
instructions: Rub lime on rim and dip in salt.
Shake tequila, triple sec and lime with ice.
Strain into the prepared glass and serve.

title: Ember Old-Fashioned
instructions: Stir bourbon, sugar syrup and bitters with ice.
Strain into a rocks glass over a large ice cube.
Express orange peel over the drink and garnish.

title: Elder Apple Spritz
instructions: Shake vodka, elderflower and apple juice with ice.
Strain into a glass over ice.
Top with soda and garnish with apple slice.

title: Cherry Blossom Coupe
instructions: Combine ingredients in a shaker with ice.
Shake and strain into a coupe.
Garnish with a cherry.

title: Minted Dark Storm
instructions: Muddle mint lightly with sugar syrup.
Add rum and lime with ice, shake.
Strain into a glass and garnish with mint.

title: Grapefruit Agave Cooler
instructions: Shake tequila, grapefruit and agave with ice.
Strain into a salt-rimmed glass over ice.
Garnish with a grapefruit wedge.

title: Rye Velvet
instructions: Stir whiskey, vermouth and bitters with ice.
Strain into a chilled glass.
Garnish with a cherry.

title: Cranberry Fizz
instructions: Shake vodka and juices with ice.
Strain into a glass over ice.
Top with club soda and stir gently.

title: Cucumber Chill
instructions: Shake gin, cucumber, lime and ice.
Strain into a chilled glass.
Garnish with a cucumber ribbon.

title: Spiced Sunset
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a glass over fresh ice.
Garnish with an orange slice.

title: Smoky Grapefruit
instructions: Shake mezcal, lime and agave with ice.
Strain into a rocks glass over a large ice cube.
Garnish with grapefruit twist.

title: Peach Sunrise
instructions: Combine ingredients in shaker with ice.
Shake and strain into a chilled glass.
Garnish with an orange wedge.

title: Maple Sour
instructions: Shake bourbon, lemon and maple with ice.
Strain into a rocks glass over ice.
Add a dash of bitters and stir.

title: Vermouth Garden
instructions: Stir gin, vermouth and orange liqueur with ice.
Strain into a chilled coupe.
Garnish with lemon twist.

title: Minted Daiquiri
instructions: Muddle mint with sugar syrup.
Add rum and lime with ice, shake.
Strain into a glass and garnish with mint.

title: Espresso Chill
instructions: Combine ingredients in shaker with ice.
Shake gently to chill.
Strain into a chilled glass.

title: Citrus Salt Shaker
instructions: Rub rim with lime and salt.
Shake tequila, lime and orange liqueur with ice.
Strain into prepared glass over ice.

title: Thyme Sparkler
instructions: Shake gin, lemon and honey syrup with ice.
Strain into a chilled glass.
Garnish with a sprig of thyme.

title: Nutmeg Island
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a glass over crushed ice.
Garnish with grated nutmeg.

title: Elder Soda Wheel
instructions: Stir vodka and elderflower cordial with ice.
Strain into a glass and top with soda.
Garnish with lemon wheel.

title: Coffee Velvet
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a chilled glass.
Top with a light float of cream if desired.

title: Grapefruit Honey Spritz
instructions: Shake gin, grapefruit and honey with ice.
Strain into a glass over ice.
Top with soda and garnish.

title: Mezcal Pineapple Smash
instructions: Shake mezcal, pineapple, lime and agave with ice.
Strain into a rocks glass over ice.
Garnish with pineapple leaf.

title: Pomegranate Sugar Kiss
instructions: Rim glass with sugar if desired.
Shake vodka, pomegranate and lemon with ice.
Strain into prepared glass.

title: Rum Lime Bitter
instructions: Shake rum, lime and sugar with ice.
Strain into a chilled glass.
Add a dash of bitters on top.

title: Mango Blanco
instructions: Blend or shake tequila, mango and lime with ice.
Strain into a glass.
Garnish with mango slice.

title: Raspberry Lemon Spritz
instructions: Shake gin, lemon and raspberry syrup with ice.
Strain into a glass and top with soda.
Garnish with raspberries.

title: Cognac Nightcap
instructions: Stir cognac and orange liqueur with ice.
Strain into a snifter.
Serve with a sugar cube on the side.

title: Ginger Buck
instructions: Build vodka and lime cordial over ice in a highball.
Top with ginger beer.
Garnish with lime wedge.

title: Coconut Breeze
instructions: Shake rum, coconut water and lime with ice.
Strain into a chilled glass.
Garnish with mint sprig.

title: Chartreuse Lemon Gleam
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a coupe.
Garnish with a lemon peel.

title: Spiced Cream Dream
instructions: Shake rum and coffee liqueur with ice.
Strain into glass and float the cream.
Serve chilled.

title: Fiery Jalapeño Margarita
instructions: Muddle jalapeno lightly.
Shake tequila, lime and agave with ice.
Strain into a rocks glass and garnish with jalapeno.

title: Bourbon Ginger Buck
instructions: Shake bourbon, lemon and ginger syrup with ice.
Stripain into a glass over ice.
Top with ginger beer and stir.

title: Lychee Blossom
instructions: Shake vodka and lychee syrup with ice.
Strain into chilled glass.
Garnish with a lychee.

title: Basil Breeze
instructions: Shake gin, lemon and basil syrup with ice.
Strain into a chilled glass.
Garnish with basil leaf.

title: Dark Cola Crush
instructions: Build rum and coffee liqueur over ice.
Top with cola.
Garnish with lime wedge.

title: Sunrise Cran-Orange
instructions: Shake ingredients with ice.
Strain into a chilled glass.
Garnish with orange slice.

title: Tonic Spark
instructions: Stir gin with tonic syrup and ice.
Strain into a glass and top with soda.
Garnish with lime wheel.

title: Blood Orange Smoke
instructions: Rim glass with salt optionally.
Shake mezcal, blood orange and agave with ice.
Strain into glass and garnish.

title: Rosemary Fizz
instructions: Shake vodka, lemon and rosemary syrup with ice.
Strain into a glass over ice.
Top with soda and garnish with rosemary.

title: Apricot Bourbon Glow
instructions: Shake bourbon, apricot brandy and lemon with ice.
Strain into a chilled glass.
Garnish with an apricot slice if available.

title: Ginger Zest Gin
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a coupe.
Garnish with lime zest.

title: Coffee Cream Float
instructions: Shake rum and coffee liqueur with ice.
Strain into glass and add cream.
Serve chilled.

title: Mango Tajín Margarita
instructions: Rim glass with tajin spice.
Shake tequila, mango and lime with ice.
Strain into prepared glass.

title: Velvet Kahlúa
instructions: Shake vodka, coffee liqueur and milk with ice.
Strain into a chilled glass.
Serve immediately.

title: Lavender Cloud
instructions: Dry shake egg white with other ingredients, then add ice and shake.
Double strain into a coupe.
Garnish with lavender sprig or lemon twist.

title: Spiced Rye Twist
instructions: Stir ingredients with ice.
Strain into a rocks glass over ice.
Garnish with orange twist.

title: Pear Blossom
instructions: Shake vodka, elderflower and pear with ice.
Strain into chilled glass.
Garnish with pear slice.

title: Cucumber Agave Cooler
instructions: Muddle cucumber lightly.
Shake tequila, lime and agave with ice.
Strain into glass over ice and garnish with cucumber.

title: Grapefruit Elderflower
instructions: Shake gin, elderflower and grapefruit with ice.
Strain into glass over ice.
Top with soda and garnish.

title: Scotch Ginger Snap
instructions: Shake scotch, honey and lemon with ice.
Strain into a rocks glass over ice.
Garnish with candied ginger.

title: Passion Sugar Rim
instructions: Rim glass with sugar if desired.
Shake vodka, passionfruit and lime with ice.
Strain into prepared glass.

title: Rosemary Sour
instructions: Dry shake egg white with other ingredients, then add ice and shake.
Double strain into coupe.
Garnish with rosemary.

title: Tropical Banana Punch
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a chilled glass.
Garnish with banana chip.

title: Minted Vodka Crush
instructions: Muddle mint with simple syrup.
Add vodka and lime with ice and shake.
Strain into glass and garnish with mint.

title: Sunrise Tequila Twist
instructions: Shake tequila, triple sec and orange juice with ice.
Strain into a glass and slowly add grenadine for a sunrise effect.
Garnish with orange slice.

title: Elderflower Lime Spritz
instructions: Shake gin, lime and elderflower with ice.
Strain into a glass over ice.
Top with soda and garnish.

title: Pineapple Mint Cooler
instructions: Muddle mint lightly.
Shake rum, lime and pineapple syrup with ice.
Strain into glass and garnish with mint.

title: Basil Lemon Sparkle
instructions: Shake vodka, lemon and basil syrup with ice.
Strain into a glass and top with soda.
Garnish with basil leaf.

title: Cider Bourbon
instructions: Shake bourbon, apple cider and maple with ice.
Strain into a rocks glass.
Garnish with a cinnamon stick.

title: Cassis Gin Fizz
instructions: Shake gin, lemon and cassis with ice.
Strain into a glass and top with soda.

title: Salted Lime Margarita
instructions: Rim glass if desired.
Shake tequila, lime and agave with ice.
Strain into glass over ice.

title: Carrot Ginger Zing
instructions: Shake vodka, carrot and ginger with ice.

Garnish with lemon peel.

title: Tamarind Rum Cooler
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a rocks glass.

title: Cucumber Cooler
instructions: Shake gin, lemon and cucumber syrup with ice.
Strain into a glass over ice.
Top with soda and garnish with cucumber.

title: Honey Whiskey Sour
instructions: Dry shake egg white with other ingredients, add ice and shake.
Double strain into a coupe.
Garnish with grated nutmeg.

title: Grapefruit Rosemary Spritz
instructions: Shake vodka, grapefruit and rosemary with ice.
Strain into a glass and top with soda.
Garnish with rosemary sprig.

title: Thyme Sour

Double strain into coupe.
Garnish with thyme.

title: Falernum Crush
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a glass over crushed ice.
Garnish with a lime wheel.

title: Cran-Lime Martini
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a chilled glass.
Garnish with lime wedge.

title: Pear & Elder Fizz
instructions: Shake gin, elderflower and pear with ice.
Strain into a glass and top with soda.
Garnish with pear slice.

title: Chili Lime Heat

Shake tequila, lime and chili syrup with ice.

title: Cucumber Lemon Spritz
instructions: Shake vodka, cucumber and lemon with ice.

Garnish with mint sprig.

title: Chocolate Bourbon Float
instructions: Shake bourbon, coffee liqueur and chocolate with ice.
Strain into glass and float cream.

title: Blackberry Gin Fizz
instructions: Shake gin, lemon and blackberry syrup with ice.
Strain into a glass and top with soda.

title: Coconut Pine Colada
instructions: Blend or shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a chilled glass.
Garnish with pineapple wedge.

title: Basil Lime Spritz
instructions: Shake vodka, lime and basil syrup with ice.
Strain into glass and top with soda.
Garnish with basil leaf.

title: Elderflower Lemon Soda
instructions: Shake gin, elderflower and lemon with ice.

Shake tequila and lime with ice.
Strain into prepared glass and top with grapefruit soda.

title: Maple Lemon Old-Fashioned
instructions: Shake bourbon, maple and lemon with ice.

title: Peach Fizz
instructions: Shake vodka, peach and lemon with ice.

title: Spiced Mint Rum
instructions: Muddle mint lightly with spiced syrup.

Double strain into coupe.

title: Orange Agave Tequila
instructions: Shake tequila, lime and agave with ice.

title: Pomegranate Spritz
instructions: Shake vodka, lemon and pomegranate with ice.
Strain into glass and top with soda.

title: Cherry Manhattan

Strain into a chilled glass.

title: Cucumber Gin Cooler
instructions: Shake gin, cucumber and lime with ice.
Strain into a glass and top with soda.
Garnish with cucumber ribbon.

title: Tamarind Rum Smash
instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a rocks glass.
Garnish with lime.

title: Lemon Elder Soda
instructions: Stir vodka and elderflower with ice.
Strain into glass and top with lemon soda.
Garnish with lemon slice.

title: Rose Gin Fizz

Double strain into coupe.
Garnish with rose petal.

title: Chipotle Pineapple Margarita
instructions: Shake tequila, pineapple, lime and chipotle syrup with ice.

title: Blood Orange Bourbon
instructions: Shake bourbon, blood orange and honey with ice.

instructions: Shake vodka, lemon and rosemary with ice.
Strain into glass and top with soda.

title: Mango Gin Spritz
instructions: Shake gin, lime and mango syrup with ice.
